provider_id.description: Stable unique identifier. Format: 'tool:{name}:{version}' or a DID.

public_key_hex.description: Ed25519 public key as 64-character lowercase hex (32 bytes).

capabilities.description: List of resource types this provider can act on and attest.

revoked_at.description: Null if active. Set to revocation timestamp if this provider's key is no longer trusted.
